title: Hardy Seed Emergence
description: Affirms when resilient, self-propagating ideas or communities sprout in disturbed or hostile environments without need for artificial support.
indicators: Resilient innovations arising in low-resource or disrupted conditions
Self-pollination and self-propagation without centralized inputs
Communities flourishing outside dominant systems of control
Disturbed ground becoming fertile soil for emergent creativity
